title: S.O.M X WILDER WILD
description: A Compatibility Resourcepack for Story of Minecraft and the Wilder Wild+ Mods
body:
![S.O.M X Wilder Wild](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/73079f856ed9ea6671a2b9729eb56e485e812fe1.png)
_______________________________________________________________________
> # Description
> **_This is a compatibility resourcepack for the Story of Minecraft resourcepack and Wilder Wild, Trailier Tales, The Copperier Age,Netherier Nether Mods. Makes things consistent if you have these Mods with the Story of Minecraft resourcepack so things won't be weird or off looking._** 
__________________________________
> # Dependencies
You need these for this to work otherwise theres no point in being here.
_________________________________
